title: newtonia aubrevillei subsp. aubrevillei
intro: Newtonia aubrevillei subsp. aubrevillei, also known as Aubreville's Newtonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is native to Africa and has been traditionally used in medicine for its various health benefits. Newtonia aubrevillei subsp. aubrevillei has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal properties, and its leaves can be used in traditional herbal preparations to relieve symptoms and promote overall well-being.
